caption: A man is positioned in a recording studio, set against a background of dark grey acoustic foam panels with a ribbed texture. He is wearing over-ear headphones and a dark zip-up hoodie over a grey t-shirt. A professional condenser microphone, mounted on a black boom arm, is positioned directly in front of his face. Throughout the sequence, the man remains stationary, facing slightly to the right. He maintains a neutral expression, blinking his eyes and slightly shifting his gaze across the frames. The equipment and environment remain constant, with no on-screen text or logos visible. The only movement is the slight change in his facial expression and the blinking of his eyes as he looks forward.
